nasb.text: Let them also offer sacrifices of thanksgiving, And tell of His works with joyful singing.

esv.text: And let them offer sacrifices of thanksgiving, and tell of his deeds in songs of joy!

cnv.text: 願他們以感謝為祭獻給他， 歡欣地述說他的作為。

ccb.text: 他们当向祂献上感恩祭， 欢然歌颂祂的作为。

csbs.text: 愿他们献上感谢的祭物， 在欢呼中讲述他所做的！
